content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Battlefront_copy.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' released in September 2004.]]
A list of events in '''2004''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 5|05]] – [[Destabilization (RPG adventure)|''Destabilization'']] article published on [[Wizards of the Coast]] website.
*[[January 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]] published.
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Republic 60|''Republic'' 60]] published.
*28 – [[Empire 16|''Empire'' 16]] published.
*28 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 2|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*[[January 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Jedi Code trilogy]]'' published.
** – ''[[Padawannabes]]''
** – ''[[Jedi Code: The Way of the Force]]''
** – ''[[The Dark Side Beckons]]''

==February==
*[[February 3|03]] – ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' published.
*[[February 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[February 11|11]] – [[Tony Pope]] dies.
*11 – [[Star Wars: Republic: Rite of Passage (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Rite of Passage'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] published.
*[[February 24|24]] – [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] published.
*[[February 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 3: Last Stand on Jabiim]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' published.
*[[March 3|03]] – [[Empire 17|''Empire'' 17]] published.
*03 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 3|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*[[March 17|17]] – [[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]] published.
*[[March 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]] is released for subscribers.
*[[March 24|24]] – ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' published
*[[March 26|26]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 11]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[March 27|27]] – [[Peter Diamond]] dies.
*[[March 29|29]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 12]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[March 30|30]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 13]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[March 31|31]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 14]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*31 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 4|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*?? – ''[[Escape from Dagu]]'' to be published, but cancelled.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 15]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[April 2|02]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 16]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[April 5|05]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 17]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[April 6|06]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 18]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*06 – ''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' published.
*06 – [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]] published.
*[[April 7|07]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 19]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*07 – [[Republic 63|''Republic'' 63]] published.
*[[April 8|08]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 20]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Empire 18|''Empire'' 18]] published.
*21 – [[Mary Selway]] dies.
*[[April 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Insider 76|''Star Wars Insider'' 76]] is released for subscribers.
*[[April 28|28]] – [[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]] published.

==May==
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] published.
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Tales 19|''Star Wars Tales'' 19]] published.
*14-[[May 16|16]] – The fifth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[May 18|18]] – ''[[The Hive]]'' published.
*18 – [[Star Wars Insider 76|''Star Wars Insider'' 76]] published.
*[[May 21|21]]-[[May 23|23]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 26|26]] – [[Empire 20|''Empire'' 20]] published.
*26 – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Two: Darklighter|''Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[May 28|28]]-[[May 30|30]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' published.
*[[June 2|02]] – [[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] published.
*[[June 4|04]]-[[June 6|06]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 4: Light and Dark]]'' published.
*[[June 11|11]]-[[June 13|13]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 16|16]] – ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' published.
*[[June 29|29]] – ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' published.
*[[June 30|30]] – [[Empire 21|''Empire'' 21]] published.
*30 – [[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] published.
*30 – [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]] published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' published.
*[[July 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[July 14|14]] – [[Empire 22|''Empire'' 22]] published.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Jedi: Yoda|''Star Wars: Jedi: Yoda'']] published.
*22 – [[Star Wars Insider 77|''Star Wars Insider'' 77]] is released for subscribers.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Star Wars Insider 77|''Star Wars Insider'' 77]] published.
*[[August 4|04]] – [[Republic 67|''Republic'' 67]] published.
*[[August 7|07]] – [[Wookieepedia]] concept begins to form.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]] published.
*[[August 25|25]] – [[Republic 68|''Republic'' 68]] published.
*[[August 31|31]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted in trade paperback format.

==September==
*[[September 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Mac OS X|Mac OS X]].
*[[September 8|08]] – [[Empire 24|''Empire'' 24]] published.
*[[September 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' released on the PC, Xbox, and PS2 platforms.
*[[September 21|21]] – The [[original trilogy]] is released on DVD for the first time.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Insider 78|''Star Wars Insider'' 78]] released for subscribers.
*[[September 28|28]] – ''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' published.
*[[September 29|29]] – [[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] published.
*29 – ''[[Star Wars: Panel to Panel]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope (junior novelization)]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)]]'' published.
*[[October 4|04]] – ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)]]'' begins release on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[October 5|05]] – [[Star Wars Insider 78|''Star Wars Insider'' 78]] published.
*20 – [[Star Wars Tales 21|''Star Wars Tales'' 21]] published.
*[[October 26|26]] – ''[[Jedi Trial]]'' published.
*26 – ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' published.
*26 – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' published.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] published.
*27 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' expansion pack released.
*28 – [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 53|''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 53]] published.
*?? – ''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' daily webstrips published on Hyperspace from October 2004 to June [[2005]].

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' published.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Empire 26|''Empire'' 26]] published.
*[[November 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2]]'' published.
*[[November 23|23]] – ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' published.
*23 – ''[[Star Wars Animated Adventures: Droids]]'' released on DVD.
*23 – ''[[Star Wars Animated Adventures: Ewoks]]'' released on DVD.
*23 – [[Star Wars Insider 79|''Star Wars Insider'' 79]] released to subscribers.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]] published.
*24 – [[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] published.
*?? – [[Basil Tomlin]] dies.

==December==
*02 – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]] is launched.
*[[December 6|06]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platform.
*[[December 7|07]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' published.
*07 – [[Star Wars Insider 79|''Star Wars Insider'' 79]] published.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Empire 27|''Empire'' 27]] published.
*[[December 17|17]] – [[One of a Kind (short story)|"One of a Kind"]] published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*23 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' is released in Japan.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Empire 28|''Empire'' 28]] published.
*29 – [[Obsession 2|''Obsession'' 2]] published.
*29 – [[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]] published.

==Unknown==
**''[[For Fun and Profit]]'' {{C|Associative interactive}}
**''[[Contract AA23 (roleplaying adventure)|Contract AA23]]
**''[[Jigsaw trilogy]]''
***''[[Portrait of the Artist as a Young Rodian]]''
***''[[In the Name of the Maker]]''
***''[[Cloak and Vibroblade]]''
**''[[Inside-out trilogy]]''
***''[[Lockdown on Soboll]]''
***''[[Uffel's Prisoners]]''
***''[[Storm's Depths]]''
**''[[The Replacements]]''
**''[[A Mon Alone]]''
**''[[Hunting the Wyrd]]''
**''[[Decisions trilogy]]''
***''[[Decision: Almas]]''
***''[[Decision: Coruscant]]''
***''[[Decision: Cularin]]''

----
